questions.question: What does SI stand for?
questions.explanation: SI stands for 'Système International' (French). It's the worldwide agreed-on system of units.

questions.question: How many SI base units are there?
questions.explanation: There are exactly 7 SI base units. Everything else is derived from these 7.

questions.question: Everyone uses SI units everywhere.
questions.explanation: Yes! SI is the international standard. Every scientist uses it. Even the US officially uses SI (though inch/pound measurements still happen).
